$comment: The ERC-8226 0Gora — a verifiable public forum for ERC-8226 (the 'Regulated Agent Mandate'). Same framework as the 0G agora (../../src), different corpus + branding. This is the SINGLE declarative source of truth for what makes this instance about ERC-8226; it carries NO secrets (the wallet key + runtime toggles live in .env). It is co-hosted with the 0G agora on one deployment — both answer on the SAME funded 0G wallet — and the two are kept apart only by `id`/`collection` below.
$comment_instance: `id` is this agora's stable handle (used in API calls + the in-app switcher); `collection` is its OWN Qdrant collection — distinct from the 0G agora's `0gora` — so the two corpora never mix; `switcherLabel` is the short name shown in the switcher dropdown.
name: ERC-8226 Agora
instanceLabel: the Regulated Agent Mandate agora · built on 0Gora
ecosystem: the ERC-8226 Regulated Agent Mandate standard

hero.title: ERC-8226
hero.sub: A public forum for ERC-8226 — the Regulated Agent Mandate. Answers are grounded in the EIP/ERC spec and the Ethereum Magicians discussion, generated and cryptographically verified inside a 0G TEE — so you can trust where they came from.

examples: What is the Regulated Agent Mandate?
How is a mandate issued, scoped, and revoked?
What's the status of ERC-8226 and where is it discussed?

corpus.$comment: Seed sources for this agora, ingested via POST /contribute (see seed.sh). Source 1 is the ERC text in the ethereum/ERCs repo; source 2 is the Ethereum Magicians discussion thread. NOTE: extraction quality is verified at seed time — if a source yields too few chunks (e.g. a JS-rendered Discourse thread paginates its replies), switch it to the raw markdown URL or to mode 'site' with a small max_pages.

prompts.$comment: Optional system-prompt overrides. null = use the framework default, which is templated from `name` + `ecosystem` above.

models.$comment: Auto model routing. Same roster as the 0G agora — both agoras run on the one funded 0G wallet, so they offer the same TEE-verified models. ids MUST match the funded ZEROG_MODELS allowlist in .env.
